thread_title: ✅「已回答」夏活剧情序幕暴雷问题

content:
Hi, could you provide your game UID? 
If you could provide a bug recording, it would help us locate the problem faster💗

Yeah I had this surprise on one variant of Myriam during a D-Dive I believe of 2 days ago, (can't record it I guess), which changes her intention to high dmg as in the picture when triggering a 5th exalt.

In my case it went like this:
I petrified Myriam for the first time with Aigis exalt, I was at 4th exalt at this point. Then after using a few cards, I used Ghelot exalt, triggering Myriam boss' ability that changes her intention to high dmg, bypassing the petrify ability, but still shown as petrified.

Then she does her high dmg and I die, not noticing her intention had changed, because she was still shown as petrified, but I could notice afterward that her intention had indeed changed while being petrified
Thank you, we will check first🙏
💭「Processing」Petrify dispel
happens with a lot of bosses, not just that one. some just ignore petrify and lose it at the same time, others ignore it but then are petrified in the next round and others just stay petrified
i think is the change of intention from phase change or other particular mechanics, still an inconsistency
yeah, prolly hard coded into the whole changing phase thing which is why the game doesnt see it as a separate action of the boss therefore it just goes through
Thank you for your feedback. We‘ll check it out🙏
💭「Processing」Clementine's wheel description is broken

Hi~ 
Only the actual effects of the Wheel of Destiny are displayed during combat, and currently, its in-game actual performance aligns with the expected design logic🙏
✅「Answered」Clementine's wheel description is broken

Hello again !
The wheel has no problems in combat, however outside of combat it is impossible to know of its effect.
Tawil's wheel (*Wheel Unseen*) also boosts Keyflare Regen, however Tawil tells you what the boost is.
With Clementine's wheel (*Veiled Anguish*) it is a surprise :'(
The exact % of boost used to be visible before in the description, can we have it back 🥺 ?
I'll go communicate the issue<:pray:1356053116260454534>
Hi, Goya has confirmed that there are no issues here. Perhaps you have some misunderstandings about 'paradox', as the extra cost of the exalt is globally effective<:Emoji_KP_P_01:1400771643743408210>
✅「Answered」“Bug” with paradox and overexalt?
Thanks, it’s a mistranslation - the English version makes it sound like it should give aliemus back after exalt.
I will confirm if there is any mistranslation issue🌹
Should be, is just the same as in this other post https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1411603734978625536

After confirming with team, the English description of this Covenant should be: **Increases the Aliemus Cap and Exalt Aliemus consumption by 20.** When an Awakener with this Covenant uses Over-Exalt, the Exalt should cost 240 Aliemus.

We will fix and update this description in an upcoming update. Sorry for the confusion!🌹
嗨，我们多次查验仍无法复现这个问题，测试结果都符合预期，能否提供更多问题细节（如在遇到bug前 有哪些操作）

This is the launch event battle pass on the Japanese server; it's very easy to accumulate 100 pulls. However, here on the global server, this summer battle pass was launched in the middle of the version. Anyone who wanted to pull on the character banner has already done so long ago—where are we supposed to get another 100 pulls now? We hope you can change this mission.

content: How is that okay? I already paid for a bundle, now I have to use wishes for a banner I'm not interested in just to receive all copies of the wheel...? In two weeks? This is ridiculous. At least give us time until next patch, so it makes some sense, otherwise change this requirement.

I agree. The 100 awakenings requirement should be changed for global. It makes sense in JP because they're new and they have a lot of pulls, but for us we literally have 3 ongoing (kath, triple rerun, paid banners) and most of us have already used up the cores or have decided to save for the new character.
We’re very sorry! We’ll extend the Battle Pass and event availability by three weeks later. 很抱歉！我们会延长纪行和活动的持续时间三周。
✅「Answered」New event?
Thank you for your help. We will verify again<:pray:1356053116260454534>
